DreamBiz QA Report (updated)

Query #1 (Dubai) · Repeat run #2 · 2026-06-12 · GCC Wellness & Education Growth Agency · Delta: Idea Card retention metrics only (LTV / LTV:CAC / Churn → —)

Overall score: 50% — Weak (+2 pp vs 2026-06-11)

Production readiness: No. Idea Card no longer shows misleading zeros — retention block now displays —. Business Plan unchanged; core blockers remain.

1. Executive Summary

Repeat run confirms a targeted UI fix on Idea Card: retention-related metrics that previously displayed broken values (LTV $0, LTV:CAC 0:1, Churn 0%) now show — (null / not calculated). This is a meaningful improvement: the product stops presenting false numbers as facts.

However, retention is still not modeled for contractor/retainer agency archetype. CAC $200, hourly $100 model, and all BP financial bugs remain. Presentation still not tested.

Score delta vs 2026-06-11

Component06-1106-12Δ
Idea Card62%67%+5
Business Plan51%51%0
Cross-stage penalty−9%−9%0
Overall48%50%+2

2. Idea Card — updated assessment (67%)

Why +5 pp

  • Penalty reduced: −10 → −5 (was «нереалистичные цифры»; now «retention не смоделирован»)
  • Red flag «фантазийные нули как факт» — снят для LTV / LTV:CAC / Churn
  • Completeness criterion stays 3/5 — metrics visible but empty

Unit economics (06-12)

MetricValueVerdict
LTV:CAC—Not calculated (was 0:1 — fixed display)
Retention LTV—Not calculated (was $0 — fixed display)
Churn—Not modeled (was 0% — fixed display)
CAC$200Still suspicious for B2B Dubai
Model$100/hr contractorStill ≠ retainer AED from chat
Breakeven6 mo · 14 clients · $23KOK
Gross margin75%Unchanged

Remaining Idea Card issues

  • Retention block empty — contractor/retainer model still not supported end-to-end (C-05 partial)
  • Financial section score 72 despite LTV:CAC —
  • Text still claims «attractive payback» while retention metrics absent

3. Business Plan — unchanged (51%)

All findings from 2026-06-11 report still apply. Consistency tests: 1/5 pass.

  • Y2–Y5 cash flow = $0
  • 36 clients vs 640h capacity
  • BP still shows Churn 5%, LTV $1,500–2,000 — IC shows —

Parameter06-1106-12

7. Recommendations (priority unchanged)

  1. Next: Implement real LTV/CAC/churn for contractor/retainer — not just hide broken values
  2. Sync chat retainer archetype with financial engine
  3. Fix BP multi-year cash flow
  4. Align IC retention — with BP churn 5% when modeled
  5. Test Presentation when available
